title: Stunning False Nails with Glue - Assorted Colors, 1 Pc - Perfect Fit & Gorgeous Vibrant Finish for All Occasions
features: STUNNING ASSORTED COLORS: Choose from Purple, Pink, Red, Silver, Black, and Ice Blue to match any outfit and create the perfect look for every occasion.
3 DIFFERENT SIZES INCLUDED: Our false nails are designed to fit every nail shape and size, ensuring a seamless and natural appearance.
GLUE INCLUDED: No need to buy additional nail glue - it's already included with your Stunning False Nails, providing an easy, mess-free application process.

DURABLE & LONG-LASTING FINISH: Made with high-quality materials, our false nails are not only vibrant and eye-catching but also durable. Enjoy a stunning nail look that lasts through day-to-day activities and special events.

PERFECT FOR ALL OCCASIONS: Ideal for parties, weddings, date nights, or simply to elevate your everyday style. Our Stunning False Nails provide an instant, hassle-free nail transformation that will leave you feeling and looking your best.
description: Looking for a way to elevate your look without breaking the bank? Look no further than our Stunning False Nails with Glue! Our nails are designed to give you a flawless and glamorous look in minutes. With a variety of assorted colors to choose from, you can mix and match to your heart's desire. From subtle nudes to bold and vibrant shades, our false nails are perfect for any occasion. Each pack comes with 1 set of false nails and a bottle of glue for easy application. Our nails are made from high-quality materials, ensuring a comfortable fit that lasts all day or night. Not only do these false nails look amazing on their own, but they also provide the perfect base for adding your own personal touch. Add some nail art or gems to create a unique and customized look that is sure to turn heads.
